title: Xtra Light German Beef Gratin
description: A charred, light German dish featuring beef gravy, whisk, and dairy-free-friendly ingredients, perfect for a special occasion.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the beef strips and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside.
Add the sliced onion to the skillet and cook until caramelized, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
In a small bowl, whisk together the beef broth, non-dairy milk, and tomato paste.
Pour the whisked mixture over the onion and garlic in the skillet.
Return the beef to the skillet and stir to coat with the sauce.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the oven and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
